---
title: "MCMC"
description: "Explore Monte Carlo methods with hopping frogs"
image: "../assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/thumbnail.png"
---

This demo is based upon Figure 12.1 from John Miller's book [A Crude Look at the Whole](https://www.complexityexplorer.org/explore/resources/668-a-crude-look-at-the-whole).

Monte Carlo algorithms are often used to explore probability distributions. Particularly, the Metropolis-Hastings algorithm is an extremely widely used technique for sampling from distributions. In this story, there are a few frog characters to familiarize ourselves with. 

First up, explorer frog:

- Red
- Doesn't care about flies, wanders to any lilypad.

Next, we have *exploiter frog* (also known as *greedy frog*):

- Blue
- Wants flies, now.

Finally, our most complicated frog will be *sampler frog*:

- Green
- Wants flies, most of the time (!)

In the Metropolis-Hastings algorithm, in order to sample from a distribution proportional to $P(x)$, a proposed move from a "state" $x$ to some new state $x'$ will be "accepted" with probability 
$$P_{\text{accept}}(x \rightarrow x') = \min\left(1,\frac{P(x)}{P(x')}\right).$$ 
(really we should be sure our proposals are symmetric, but we won't worry about that in this demonstration). 

In this analogy, the states $x$ are the different lilypads, and the probability $P(x)$ is the number of flies at each lilypad. The frog characters then correspond to the behavior of this Monte Carlo algorithm at different values of $\beta$. Below, you can tinker with these parameters to explore how the distribution of frogs is related to the distribution of flies depending on the $\beta$ parameter.


```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="../demos_code/demos/metropolis_hastings/main.css">
<div class="mh-demo">
    <div id="all-container">
        <div id="simulation-container">
            <div id="fps"></div>
            <div id="simulation"></div>
            <div id="barPlot">
                <div id="barPlotTitle">
                    <div class="toggle-container">
                        <div class="barPlotTitleText" id="currentFrogCount" style="font-weight: bold;">Current Frog Count</div>
                        <label class="mh-switch">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="frogToggle">
                            <span class="slider-switch"></span>
                        </label>
                        <div class="barPlotTitleText" id="accumulatedFrogCount">Accumulated Frog Count</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <svg id="barPlotSVG"></svg>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div id="controls">
            <div>
                <div class="slider-title">Inverse Temperature</div>
                <div class="slider-container">
                    <div class="mh-param-label" style="left: 0;">&#946; = 0</div>
                    <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitRed.svg" alt="Red Frog" class="left-frog">
                    <div class="slider-wrapper">
                        <div class="slider-value" id="frogBeta">β = 0.00</div>
                        <input type="range" id="frogZSlider" min="0" max="1" step="0.001" value="0">
                    </div>
                    <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitBlue.svg" alt="Blue Frog" class="right-frog">
                    <div class="mh-param-label" style="right: 0;">&#946; = &infin;</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <div class="slider-title">Number of Frogs</div>
                <div class="slider-container">
                    <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog" class="left-frog">
                    <div class="slider-wrapper">
                        <div class="slider-value" id="frogCount">1</div>
                        <input type="range" id="frogCountSlider" min="1" max="20" value="1">
                    </div>
                    <div class="frogs">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                        <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <div class="slider-title">Simulation Speed</div>
                <div class="slider-container">
                    <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogSitGreen.svg" alt="Green Frog" class="left-frog">
                    <div class="slider-wrapper">
                        <input type="range" id="simulationSpeedSlider" min="1" max="20" value="1">
                    </div>
                    <img src="/assets/images/notes/metropolis_hastings/frog/FrogLeapGreen.svg" alt="Green Leap Frog" class="right-frog">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="mh-credit">
        <i>Developed by <a href="https://www.maxjerdee.com">Max Jerdee</a>, art by Vellia Zhou.</i>
    </div>
</div>
<script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script>
<script src="../demos_code/demos/metropolis_hastings/main.js"></script>
```
